name: SCC_CreatePreChargeRes_ISO
title: SCC_CreatePreChargeRes_ISO
syntax: long SCC_CreatePreChargeRes_ISO ( byte SessionID[], char ResponseCode[], long NotificationMaxDelay, char StatusCode[], char Notification[], float PresentVoltage )
description: Creates a PreCharge Response message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
